name: Ceramic Accent Table Natural Off-White - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee (Fully Assembled)
description:
Elevate any corner of your home with this Ceramic Accent Table from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. Crafted from ceramic, this hexagonal table features a white base with floral print that brings clean, modern texture to your space. Its solid, one-piece construction makes it visually streamlined, while the compact size works beautifully beside a sofa, reading chair or even as a decorative stand.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.

Overall Width: 14.17 inches
Overall Height: 17.72 inches
Overall Depth: 14.17 inches
